name: mustafaturkyilmaz
description: Monorepo: shared Strapi backend + portfolio + admin + Ledgeria routes

scripts.dev: concurrently -n ledgeria-api,portfolio,admin -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w ledgeria-api" "npm run dev -w portfolio-web" "npm run dev -w admin-web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w ledgeria-api && npm run build -w portfolio-web && npm run build -w admin-web
scripts.start: concurrently -n ledgeria-api,portfolio,admin -c blue,magenta,green "npm run start -w ledgeria-api" "npm run start -w portfolio-web" "npm run start -w admin-web"
